response.justification: Szabo demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals with 17 years of experience across multiple platforms and languages, including hands-on work at scale (Dunnhumby's millions of requests/sec) and shipped products. However, the resume lacks any evidence of experimentation platforms, A/B testing, metrics infrastructure, or telemetry systems—critical components of this Principal role. While his breadth and technical depth could enable growth, he would need to rapidly develop domain expertise in growth measurement and experimentation systems that the role demands.
strengths: 17 years of continuous software engineering with demonstrated ability to work at scale (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby, multi-region systems)
Proficiency across all required languages (C, C++, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript) and proven ability to build diverse systems from embedded to distributed platforms
Track record of shipped products and open-source contributions showing technical depth, knowledge-sharing ability, and willingness to mentor
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or A/B testing frameworks—core to the role's focus
Resume lacks any evidence of metrics, telemetry, data analysis, or statistical methods experience despite role's emphasis on 'high data aptitude'
Limited evidence of Principal-level leadership on multi-team initiatives, cross-functional architecture decisions, or translating business goals into systems

key_factors.factor: Missing experimentation and metrics domain expertise
Strong foundational engineering and language proficiency
